tasks.description: Implement get_commit_log and get_refs Tauri commands that return structured commit DAG data from git2::Revwalk. Create src-tauri/src/git/ log types and register commands in lib.rs.
steps: invoke('get_commit_log', { path: '.', maxCount: 100 }) returns commit array with parents

tasks.description: Define CommitNode, GraphSegment, LayoutResult types. Implement assignLanes() and buildSegments() as pure functions. Layout 10k synthetic commits in < 100ms.
steps: Generate 10k synthetic commits, run layout, verify lane count < 50 and no lane < 0

tasks.description: Implement render.ts with batched draw functions (edges, nodes, labels, text, selection, hover). Implement virtual scrolling with sticky canvas + spacer div pattern. Handle Retina DPR scaling.
Implement hitTest.ts for mouse to element mapping. Wire click, hover, right-click, and keyboard events in GraphCanvas.svelte. Implement context menu component.
steps: Click selects commit, hover highlights row, arrow keys navigate, right-click shows menu

tasks.description: Build CommitDetail.svelte showing full commit info when a commit is selected. Include: hash (copyable), author, date, message, parent links, refs.
steps: Selecting a commit shows detail panel with all fields populated

tasks.description: Build FpsOverlay.svelte showing FPS, frame time, visible rows, total commits, layout time. Toggleable with a keyboard shortcut.
steps: FPS counter visible in top-right corner, shows accurate frame timing

tasks.description: Connect Rust backend to frontend: invoke get_commit_log on page load, feed results through layout engine, render in canvas. Update +page.svelte to show the graph view with sidebar. Add repo path selection (open folder dialog via Tauri).
steps: pnpm check + cargo check both pass
Open a real git repo with 1k+ commits — graph renders, interactions work, FPS overlay shows data

tasks.description: Open a large real repo (git/git, torvalds/linux, or generate synthetic 10k DAG). Verify all success criteria: 60fps scroll, correct topology, crisp Retina rendering, no visual glitches.
steps: FPS overlay shows >= 55fps during continuous scroll with 10k commits
No blank frames, all interactions responsive

patterns: Git module: src-tauri/src/git/ (error.rs, repository.rs, cli.rs, mod.rs)
